title: OP_CHECKMULTISIG
description: Legacy Script opcode that verifies an m-of-n set of signatures against a list of public keys. Its historical off-by-one bug explains why multisig spends include a leading OP_0 placeholder in the unlocking script.

resources.title: P2MS - Pay To Multisig
resources.notes: Decoding walkthrough showing how OP_CHECKMULTISIG appears in bare multisig locking scripts and why OP_0 is required when spending them.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Canonical description of multisig scripts, the extra stack item bug, and the standard script form used with OP_CHECKMULTISIG.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Script-level reference for opcode behavior, stack evaluation, and legacy multisig spending patterns.
